rationale: Educ. Code §29.1544 governs prekindergarten program reporting requirements and contains no provisions related to property tax homestead exemptions or school district revenue calculations.
quote: The agency by rule shall require each school district that offers a prekindergarten program under Section 29.153 and each private entity that provides a prekindergarten program under contract with a school district to report the following information
_note: No conflict; this statute addresses prekindergarten reporting and is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
